arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man United - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as the Gunners look to continue improved form against Ruben Amorim who is unbeaten as United boss plus updates from Aston Villa vs Brentford
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Arsenal host Manchester United and Aston Villa take on Brentford in Premier League action.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Brentford LIVE match updates and team news from Villa Park
arts.sum: Emery has never had a nine-match winless run in his managerial career, while Brentford are without a league win at Villa Park in their 135-year history. They've won just six of their past 17 home league games, directly following a club record streak of 15 successive top-flight victories at Villa Park.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins hopes to go one better as four Aston Villa teammates battle for votes
arts.sum: Forward Ollie Watkins shone for Villa in 2023/24, scoring 27 times in all competitions and earning himself a ticket on the plane to Germany for Euro 2024 with England - where he would send the Three Lions to final with that late goal against the Netherlands. Villa supporters didn't share the rest of football's sense of shock when Ollie Watkins stepped off the bench to score England's Euro 2024 semi final winner against the Netherlands.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa slumped to 14th in Premier League after a humbling 3-0 defeat by Chelsea that saw winless run extend to EIGHT matches... What's going on at the club? Is Unai Emery's job under threat?
arts.sum: Aston Villa are currently a team in dire straits. Their 3-0 loss to Chelsea at the weekend was compounded by a toothless performance.

arts.ttl: Big Aston Villa injury update – Star is playing tonight
arts.sum: Emiliano Martinez will play for Aston Villa this evening despite suffering a hairline fracture in his hand last weekend. That’s according to journalist Gastón Edul, who says the Aston Villa goalkeeper is ready for the clash with Brentford. Martinez had been expected to miss a period of games after suffering an injury in the defeat The post Big Aston Villa injury update – Star is playing tonight appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Sam Allardyce says whether Jack Grealish should leave Man City and re-join Aston Villa
arts.sum: Jack Grealish’s career hasn’t quick kicked on in the way he imagined it would when he joined Manchester City. Yes, Grealish has won countless trophies,...

arts.ttl: 'I've never witnessed' - Unai Emery told Aston Villa 'priority' as supporters call for change - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Villa are currently contending with a run of poor form, with their most recent outing resulting in a 3-0 Premier League defeat to Chelsea at Stamford Bridge. Aston Villa supporters have been voicing their concerns over their side's current form under Unai Emery .

Bench-warmers, Achilles heel and a predator - sorting out Aston Villa - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Brumy : Sorry Unai tells them how to play passing the ball about in 6 yd box it’s suicidal Konsa Cash only pass backwards Carlos a liability Torres great footballer but can’t defend in this league,Mings Jury still out oh and not one of them can head a ball. crazycat1 : We need to use all the squad if players on the bench are not good enough to step up we should move them on, which is easier said than done I know
